free_text: Statistical analysis of excitation functions for
elastic and inelastic scattering of alpha-particles
on Mg and Si nuclei.
Tabulated data for Mg, Si elastic
scattering at 179 degr are given.
Data for O, Al, Ca, Ni, Co, Cu, Au are given.
The 120 cm cyclotron
Absolute errors of all cross sections
Data for Mg, Si elastic scattering at 179
degr. were replaced by tabulated values from INP-805,
1972 report.
No source of uncertainty is given.
